name: brotherhood-omega-website
description: Official Brotherhood Omega Dynasty Empire website

scripts.build: mkdir -p dist && cp -r public/* dist/ 2>/dev/null || true && cp index.html script.js style.css dist/ 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.test: npm run build && test -f dist/index.html && test -f dist/script.js && test -f dist/style.css && echo 'Website build validation passed'

author: Brotherhood Omega Dynasty Empire
